summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification shard. No shared canonical was selected; hydrated open PRs are classified independently. No mutating close/merge/fix actions are planned because merge, fix, raise_pr, low-signal closeout, and instant close are disabled, and several job refs were not hydrated in the preflight artifact.
